features: WELCOME LONG-LASTING PERFUME QUALITY FRESHNESS. With Old Spice deep cleansing technology and perfume quality scents, you’ll enjoy freshness from head-to-toe and leave the shower smelling like a bouquet of confidence

TRY THE PERFUME QUALITY SCENT OF OLD SPICE NIGHT PANTHER and unleash your nocturnal beast! This rich fragrance of dark chocolate, spicy citrus and vanilla is dangerously addictive. Prepare to prowl the night with irresistible allure!

EXPERIENCE SHOWER GREATNESS DESIGNED FOR MEN! This deep-cleansing men’s shower gel washes away odour and refreshes body and hair with perfume quality scent, transforming you into a walking legend of long-lasting freshness!

DEEP-CLEANSING AND A SMOOTH SKIN FEELING. Level up your shower gel game! Not only does the 3-in-1 shower gel wash away odour, but it also leaves your skin feeling smooth and soft like a marshmallow cloud. Once you try it, you’ll never go back
CLEANSE EVERYTHING: HAIR, BODY, FACE with our time-saving, bag-friendly body wash for men. Boom!
description: Product Description Enjoy unforgettable Long Lasting Freshness and smelltastic confidence with Old Spice Night Panther Shower Gel & Shampoo for men. With its deep cleansing formula and perfume quality scents, it drop-kicks dirt and odour, leaving you fresh and clean. This multi-use 3-in-1 formula works on body, hair and face, leaving your skin feeling irresistibly smooth, so you can focus on higher pursuits like closing deals or teaching dolphins to speak. The rich fragrance of dark chocolate, spicy citrus and vanilla is dangerously addictive. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Parfum, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Citrate, Sodium Xylenesulfonate, Sodium Salicylate, Citric Acid, Limonene, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide, Geraniol, Coumarin, CI 42090, CI 19140 Directions Not Available Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more

specifications_table.Benefits: DÜFTE IN PARFÜMQUALITÄT: Tauche ein in den opulenten Duft von dunkler Schokolade, würzigen Zitrusfrüchten und Vanille. Mit diesem unwiderstehlichen Duft entfesselst deine wilde Seite, EASY! Wasche alles: Haare, Körper, Gesicht mit unserem zeitsparenden, handlichen Körpershampoo für Männer, EINZIGARTIGES DUSCHERLEBNIS: das tiefenreinigende Duschgel reinigt nicht nur, sondern erfrischt Körper und Haare gleichzeitig mit unwiderstehlichem, manntastischen Duft, GANZ ODER GAR NICHT: Teste die 1 Liter-Größe, für mehr Tage anhaltende Frische in Parfümqualität, GENIESSE LAAANGANHALTENDE FRISCHE: von Kopf bis Fuß mit der Tiefenreinigungs-Technologie, RECYCLE MICH: Die Rettung der Welt ist erst der Anfang, also recycel die Verpackung, SAUBER & SANFT: Für ein sauberes, sanftes und geschmeidiges Hautgefühl
